name: breakout
description: 打砖块。挡板左右移动反弹球消除砖块，漏球则失败。
dsl: create object name=Paddle type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#4488FF width=80 height=16 scene=Game
create object name=Ball type=ShapePainter shape=circle color=#FFFFFF width=12 height=12 scene=Game
create object name=Brick type=ShapePainter shape=rectangle color=#FF8800 width=60 height=20 scene=Game
create object name=ScoreText type=Text scene=Game size=24
set variable name=Score value=0 type=Number scope=global
on key Left -> move Paddle to 300,570
on key Right -> move Paddle to 500,570
on collision Ball Brick -> destroy Brick, score+10
on collision Ball Paddle -> jump Ball 400
